p.em: Ensures Graph Navigability via Reciprocal Connectivity

text.tspan: // Step 3: Add reciprocal link to neighbor
// Step 3: Add reciprocal link to neighbor

div.p: Node A has searched Layer L using HNSW heuristic search and identified B, C, D as its M nearest neighbors.
A.neighbors[L].insert({B, C, D}) The adjacency list for Node A is persisted in memory.
For each neighbor N in {B, C, D}: N.neighbors[L].insert(A) Crucial for graph navigability from established nodes to new ones.
IF node.neighbors[L].len() > M_max: Run prune_neighbors_heuristic(node, L, M_max) Node D was at capacity; the link to E is dropped to maintain logarithmic search complexity.
